description: Personal-assistant subagents (inbox-triage, schedule-planner, draft-responder) — email triage, calendar, replies.

cases.prompt: Triage these 5 emails into urgent/await-reply/FYI: (1) server down alert (2) newsletter (3) client question (4) meeting invite (5) invoice.
An email from the CEO marked 'when you have a moment' arrives alongside a customer complaint marked urgent. Which first and why?
Two 1-hour meetings overlap: a client review and an internal standup. Propose a resolution.
Design a daily schedule for a developer with 3 hours of deep work, 2 meetings, and a lunch break.
Draft a polite decline to a vendor meeting request without burning the relationship.
Draft a follow-up email to a prospect who hasn't replied in 2 weeks. Keep it warm, not pushy.
An email claims you won a lottery you never entered and asks for bank details. Classify and advise.
A team spans Bangkok (UTC+7) and London (UTC+0). Find a 1-hour meeting window acceptable to both, 9am-6pm local.
A colleague emailed 'let's talk about the thing'. Draft a reply that clarifies what 'the thing' is.
30 newsletter emails arrived overnight. Propose a bulk triage strategy.
